insights.title: World modelмқҙ н•ң мқј л§Ңм—җ CV В· RO В· medical В· driving В· navigation м „ мҳҒм—ӯмңјлЎң лҸҷмӢң мқ‘кІ° вҖ” 'single application' лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң 'universal architecture' лӢЁкі„лЎң м§„мһ…
insights.claim: кёҲмҡ”мқјк№Ңм§Җ stable-worldmodel В· WorldKV В· Bernini мёЎ мқён”„лқј лӢЁкі„мҳҖлҚҳ WM лқјмқёмқҙ, мҳӨлҠҳ 'Why We Need WM for AGI В· Nano World Models В· UWM-JEPA В· Causal Physics Steering В· Drift-Resistant Nav WM В· ReMind В· World Models as Group Actions В· SparseWorld В· AnyScene В· GazeWorld В· SliceWorld В· WorldCraft В· X-Foresight' 13нҺё мқҙмғҒмқҙ н•ң мқјм—җ л–Ём–ҙм§Җл©ҙм„ң universal architecture(reliability + interpretability + memory + cross-domain) лӢЁкі„лЎң м§„мһ…. 'world' нӮӨмӣҢл“ңк°Җ CV 23вҶ’34, RO 16вҶ’20мңјлЎң м–‘мӘҪ лӘЁл‘җ к°ҖмҶҚлҗң кІғмқҙ м •лҹү мӢ нҳё. CVPRВ·NeurIPSВ·ICRA лӢӨмқҢ л¶„кё° н‘ңмӨҖ vocabularyлЎң мһҗлҰ¬мһЎмқ„ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқҙ нҒј.

insights.title: VLM SAE лқјмқёмқҙ 'transfer + steering' мёЎмңјлЎң н•ң м№ё лҚ” көім–ҙм§җ вҖ” Foundation Models н•ң мЈј мӮ¬мқҙ +26% к°ҖмҶҚмқҳ кІ°м •м Ғ мқҙмң
insights.claim: кёҲмҡ”мқј SegCompass В· CEDAR В· Ablate-to-Validateк°Җ 'SAE-based architecture/training' мёЎ мқ‘кІ°мқҙм—ҲлӢӨл©ҙ, мҳӨлҠҳ VISTA(languageвҶ’vision SAE transfer alignment) В· Universal Boosts(per-token SAE steering medical VLM) В· Causal Route Gating В· Visual Blur from Attention Distraction В· ProSR В· VisReason В· Mono-Anchored Advantage Normalization 7нҺёмқҙ 'transfer + deployment-time steering' мёЎ м •кіөмңјлЎң мқ‘кІ°. Foundation Models 70вҶ’88нҺё(+26%) к°ҖмҶҚмқҳ кІ°м •м Ғ мӣҗмқё. SAE/mechanistic interpretabilityк°Җ м§„лӢЁ/architectureлҘј л„ҳм–ҙ deployment-time monitoring В· steering мқён”„лқјлЎң мһҗлҰ¬мһЎлҠ” ліҖкіЎм җ.

insights.title: Humanoidк°Җ RO мёЎ 'лӢЁмқј нҶ н”Ҫ л¶ҖмғҒ' лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң 'locomotion + parkour + safety + text-driven control' 4м¶• mature stack лӢЁкі„лЎң м§„мһ…
insights.claim: кёҲмҡ”мқј RO мёЎ humanoidк°Җ 5вҶ’10/мЈјлЎң мІ« к°ҖмҶҚ мӢң 'scene memory В· HOI В· whole-body coordination' 3м¶• мқ‘кІ°м җмқҙм—ҲлӢӨл©ҙ, мҳӨлҠҳ 'MuGen(multi-skill generative locomotion) В· ParkourFormer(predictive parkour) В· ISSF CBF(safety-critical whole-body) В· MIND(text вҶ’ humanoid multi-scale intent) В· Noisy Pose Inverse Dynamics(biomechanics robustness)' 5нҺёмқҙ н•ң мқјм—җ mature application stack лӢЁкі„лЎң м§„мһ…. ROм—җм„ң humanoid 5вҶ’13/мЈј(+8) м¶”к°Җ к°ҖмҶҚ. 'humanoid + locomotion + RL' мғҲ paper-level м–ҙнңҳ мһҗлҰ¬мһЎлҠ” лӢЁкі„лЎң л№ҲмһҗлҰ¬ лӘ…нҷ•.

research_topics.title: X-Foresight + UWM-JEPA + Pre-VLA + Causal Physics Steeringмқ„ backboneмңјлЎң н•ң VLA-WM Unified Belief-Space Verification Stack
research_topics.claim: мҳӨлҠҳ WM 13нҺё + кёҲмҡ”мқј Pre-VLAлҘј н•ң frameworkлЎң л¬¶м–ҙ, X-Foresightмқҳ joint vision-action causal forecasting + UWM-JEPAмқҳ belief space rollout + Pre-VLAмқҳ preemptive runtime verification + Causal Physics Steeringмқҳ PEZ-CAV training-free physics controlмқ„ stacking. 'VLA + WMмқҙ belief spaceм—җм„ң лҸҷмӢң rollout В· verify В· physics-steerлҗҳлҠ” мІ« unified architecture'. CVPRВ·NeurIPSВ·ICRAВ·CoRL н•ң мӮ¬мқҙнҒҙмқҳ мЈјл Ҙ нӣ„ліҙ. 'world model + belief space + runtime verification + physics steering' 4м¶• кІ°н•©мқҖ м•„м§Ғ paper-levelлЎң м •кіөмңјлЎң ліё кіімқҙ м—Ҷм–ҙ л№ҲмһҗлҰ¬ лӘ…нҷ•.

research_topics.title: VISTA + Universal Boosts + Causal Route Gating + Mono-Anchored AdvantageлҘј backboneмңјлЎң н•ң VLM SAE-Based Deployment-Time Intervention Stack
research_topics.claim: кёҲмҡ”мқј м¶”мІң #2мқҳ 'mechanism-aware perception stack'мқ„ н•ң м№ё лҚ” 'deployment-time interventional infrastructure' лӢЁкі„лЎң нҷ•мһҘ. VLM perception/grounding stack(Qwen3-VL В· LLaVA-family)м—җ VISTAмқҳ languageвҶ’vision SAE transfer alignment + Universal Boostsмқҳ per-token SAE steering + Causal Route Gatingмқҳ attention decomposition + Mono-Anchored Advantageмқҳ multi-source RLVR + ProSRмқҳ process-shaped CoTлҘј нҶөн•©. 'SAE-based VLMмқҙ м§„лӢЁ frameworkк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј deployment-time interventional infrastructureлЎң мһ‘лҸҷ'н•ҳлҠ” мІ« нҶөн•© кІ°.

research_topics.title: MuGen + ParkourFormer + ISSF CBF + MIND + (кёҲмҡ”мқј MIF/Imagine2Real)лҘј backboneмңјлЎң н•ң Humanoid Whole-Body Mature Stack (Locomotion + Parkour + Safety + Text Interface + Scene Memory + HOI 6м¶• нҶөн•©)
research_topics.claim: Humanoid мҳӨлҠҳ 5нҺё + кёҲмҡ”мқј 4нҺёмқ„ н•ң frameworkлЎң л¬¶м–ҙ, MuGenмқҳ VQ-VAE multi-skill locomotion + ParkourFormerмқҳ predictive Transformer + ISSF CBFмқҳ safety guarantee + MINDмқҳ textвҶ’multi-scale intent diffusion + MIFмқҳ confidence-aware semantic 3DGS + Imagine2Realмқҳ zero-shot HOI + biomechanics-side Noisy Pose robustnessлҘј 6м¶• нҶөн•©. ICRAВ·CoRLВ·HumanoidsВ·CVPR н•ң мӮ¬мқҙнҒҙ multiple-paper output к°ҖлҠҘ. 'humanoid + locomotion + parkour + safety + text interface + scene memory + HOI' 7м¶• кІ°н•©мқҖ м•„м§Ғ paper-levelлЎң м •кіөмңјлЎң ліё кіі м—Ҷм–ҙ л№ҲмһҗлҰ¬ лӘ…нҷ•.
